subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after our conference exchange. We're interested in exploring potential partnership opportunities with your team and would be happy to schedule a formal meeting.

We have the following meeting slots available next week:
- April 21, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we will send a calendar invitation promptly.

Regarding your request for internal contact details: For privacy and security reasons, we do not share direct employee contact information with external parties. All collaboration inquiries should be directed to this email address, and we will ensure the appropriate team members (including senior technical leadership) are looped into discussions as needed. General information about our team and public contact points is also available on our company website.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
The Team
